verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum.   Sæpe expugnaverunt me a juventute mea,  dicat nunc Israël ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֗יר הַֽמַּ֫עֲל֥וֹת רַ֭בַּת צְרָר֣וּנִי מִנְּעוּרַ֑י יֹאמַר־נָ֝֗א יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: A gradual canticle. Often have they fought against me from my youth, let Israel now say.
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisu korkeimmassa Kuorissa. He ovat usein minua ahdistaneet, hamasta nuoruudestani, sanokaan nyt Israel;
verses.king_james: Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth, may Israel now say:

verses.latin_vulgate: sæpe expugnaverunt me a juventute mea :  etenim non potuerunt mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: רַ֭בַּת צְרָר֣וּנִי מִנְּעוּרָ֑י גַּ֝֗ם לֹא־יָ֥כְלוּ לִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: Often have they fought against me from my youth: but they could not prevail over me.
verses.finnish_biblia: He ovat usein minua ahdistaneet, hamasta nuoruudestani; mutta ei he minua voittaneet.
verses.king_james: Many a time have they afflicted me from my youth: yet they have not prevailed against me.

verses.latin_vulgate: Supra dorsum meum fabricaverunt peccatores ;  prolongaverunt iniquitatem suam.
verses.douay_rheims: The wicked have wrought upon my back: they have lengthened their iniquity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Kyntäjät ovat minun selkäni päällä kyntäneet, ja vakonsa pitkäksi vetäneet.
verses.king_james: The plowers plowed upon my back: they made long their furrows.

verses.douay_rheims: The Lord who is just will cut the necks of sinners:
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra, joka vanhurskas on, on jumalattomain köydet katkonut.
verses.king_james: The Lord is righteous: he hath cut asunder the cords of the wicked.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confundantur, et convertantur retrorsum  omnes qui oderunt Sion.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יֵ֭בֹשׁוּ וְיִסֹּ֣גוּ אָח֑וֹר כֹּ֝֗ל שֹׂנְאֵ֥י צִיּֽוֹן׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let them all be confounded and turned back that hate Sion.
verses.finnish_biblia: Tulkoon häpiään ja kääntyköön takaperin kaikki, jotka Zionia vihaavat.
verses.king_james: Let them all be confounded and turned back that hate Zion.

verses.latin_vulgate: Fiant sicut fœnum tectorum,  quod priusquam evellatur exaruit :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִ֭הְיוּ כַּחֲצִ֣יר גַּגּ֑וֹת שֶׁקַּדְמַ֖ת שָׁלַ֣ף יָבֵֽשׁ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Let them be as grass upon the tops of houses: which withereth before it be plucked up:
verses.finnish_biblia: Olkoon niinkuin ruoho kattojen päällä, joka kuivettuu ennen kuin se reväistään ylös,
verses.king_james: Let them be as the grass upon the housetops, which withereth afore it groweth up:

verses.latin_vulgate: de quo non implevit manum suam qui metit,  et sinum suum qui manipulos colligit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שֶׁלֹּ֤א מִלֵּ֖א כַפּ֥וֹ קוֹצֵ֗ר וְחִצְנ֥וֹ מְעַמֵּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Who with the mower filleth not his hand: nor he that gathereth sheaves his bosom.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joista niittäjä ei kättänsä täytä, eikä lyhteensitoja syliänsä;
verses.king_james: Wherewith the mower filleth not his hand; nor he that bindeth sheaves his bosom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et non dixerunt qui præteribant :  Benedictio Domini super vos.  Benediximus vobis in nomine Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹ֤א אָמְר֨וּ ׀ הָעֹבְרִ֗ים בִּרְכַּֽת־יְהֹוָ֥ה אֲלֵיכֶ֑ם בֵּרַ֥כְנוּ אֶ֝תְכֶ֗ם בְּשֵׁ֣ם יְהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And they that passed by have not said: The blessing of the Lord be upon you: we have blessed you in the name of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikä yksikään ohitsekäypä sano: olkoon Herran siunaus teidän päällänne: me siunaamme teitä Herran nimeen.
verses.king_james: Neither do they which go by say, The blessing of the Lord be upon you: we bless you in the name of the Lord.
